title: magnolia palandana
intro: Magnolia palandana, also known as the Borneo or Sumatran magnolia, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Borneo and Sumatra. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in folk medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Magnolia palandana has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Magnolia palandana include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal formulations.
